message:
test(wasm): expand JS-facing coverage and close bead bd-2uod1

Deepen the wasm-bindgen validation surface so the browser-facing API is
exercised as an end-to-end contract instead of only through narrow helper
unit tests.

This commit does two related things:
- extends `crates/fsqlite-wasm/src/lib.rs` with broader coverage for opening,
  closing, executing, preparing, querying, explaining, row-array conversion,
  error propagation, and parameterized prepared execution from the JS-facing
  wrapper layer;
- records the corresponding bead state transition in `.beads/issues.jsonl`,
  marking the relevant WASM validation task as closed with the verification
  notes tied to the code that now exists.

Why these files belong together:
- the bead update is not an independent bookkeeping change; it exists only
  because the wasm API validation work in this commit is what satisfied the
  task;
- keeping the code and bead closure in one commit preserves the audit trail
  from reported requirement to implemented verification coverage.
